title: Highlights of 1975-76 Results-Cereals Improvement (Sorghum)
abstract: Two trials were sent to 14 locations each, and a third, of tropical material, to 9 locations within 10 of the equator. Material showing up well in our trials included Kafinam X Simila, K X SB 65, K X Lulu dwarf, Dobbs, and some 5DX, 9DX and 2KX lines from the sorere (East Africa)Programme..........
